# `freebox_lan_interface_host` (Data Source)

Get information about a host of a LAN interface.

## Example

```terraform
data "freebox_lan_interface_host" "example" {
  interface = "..."
  host_id   = "..."
  l2ident = {
    id   = "..."
    type = "..."
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the host
- `interface` (String) Name of the interface
- `l2ident` (Object) L2 ident of the interface (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--l2ident))

<a id="nestedatt--l2ident"></a>
### Nested Schema for `l2ident`

Required:

- `id` (String)
- `type` (String)
